lessons.title: Why Script? The Automation Mindset
lessons.description: Stop typing the same commands. Learn to think like a programmer to multiply your hacking efficiency.

lessons.title: Variables: The Memory of Your Script
lessons.description: Store and manipulate data. Learn about user input, environment variables, and variable scope.

lessons.title: Making Decisions: Conditionals
lessons.description: Use `if`, `else`, and `test` to make your script react intelligently to different situations.

lessons.title: Doing the Heavy Lifting: Loops
lessons.description: Automate repetitive tasks with `for` and `while` loops. Process lists of IPs, files, and more.

lessons.title: Code Reuse: Functions
lessons.description: Write modular code. Define functions to organize your logic and avoid repetition.

lessons.title: Command Substitution & Arithmetic
lessons.description: Capture command output into variables and perform calculations within your scripts.

lessons.title: Build Your First Hacking Script
lessons.description: Combine everything you've learned to build a practical network reconnaissance tool.

lessons.title: Automation with Cron
lessons.description: Schedule your scripts to run automatically at specific times—the final piece of the automation puzzle.
